_meta.description: Feat definitions. Players choose one feat instead of ASI at levels 4, 8, 12, 16, 19.

Alert.name: Alert
Alert.description: +5 to Initiative. Can't be surprised while conscious. Unseen attackers don't gain advantage against you.

Athlete.name: Athlete
Athlete.description: Increase STR or DEX by 1 (max 20). Standing from prone costs only 5ft. Climbing doesn't cost extra movement.

Actor.name: Actor
Actor.description: Increase CHA by 1 (max 20). Advantage on Deception/Performance when impersonating. Can mimic speech.

Great Weapon Master.name: Great Weapon Master
Great Weapon Master.description: On crit or kill, bonus action melee attack. Can take -5 attack for +10 damage with Heavy weapons.

Lucky.name: Lucky
Lucky.description: 3 Luck Points per long rest. Spend to roll extra d20 on attacks, checks, or saves and choose which to use.

Mobile.name: Mobile
Mobile.description: +10ft speed. Dash ignores difficult terrain. After melee attack, no opportunity attacks from that target.

Polearm Master.name: Polearm Master
Polearm Master.description: Bonus action butt-end attack (1d4) with glaive/halberd/staff. Enemies provoke opportunity attack on entering reach.

Resilient.name: Resilient
Resilient.description: Increase one ability by 1. Gain proficiency in saving throws for that ability.

Sentinel.name: Sentinel
Sentinel.description: Opportunity attacks reduce target speed to 0. Disengage doesn't prevent your opportunity attacks. Reaction attack when ally is hit within 5ft.

Sharpshooter.name: Sharpshooter
Sharpshooter.description: Long range doesn't impose disadvantage. Ignore half and three-quarters cover. Can take -5 attack for +10 damage with ranged weapons.

Tough.name: Tough
Tough.description: Max HP increases by 2 for every level (including retroactively).

War Caster.name: War Caster
War Caster.description: Advantage on CON saves to maintain concentration. Can perform somatic components with full hands. Cast spell as opportunity attack.
